response.justification: The candidate is a strong, experienced individual contributor (13+ years across web, mobile, embedded, and developer tooling) with relevant test-automation and dev-tools work (Trial test runner, Fluent-Asserts, CI/CD, MCP code generators). However, this is a Level II people-management role requiring 2 years of people management and 3 years of formal technical leadership, and the resume shows no evidence of managing reports, running 1:1s, owning team roadmaps, or org-level leadership. The fit gap is on the core leadership requirements, not the technical ones.
strengths: Deep, broad technical background (13+ years) including developer tooling, test automation, and CI/CD
Built and maintains developer-facing tools (Trial test runner, Fluent-Asserts, MCP generators) directly relevant to engineering productivity
Some mobile-platform exposure (iOS/Apple TV apps) plus strong mentoring/teaching track record via workshops and dojos
concerns: No demonstrated people-management experience (no reports, 1:1s, or performance ownership) against the required 2 years
Technical leadership is implied by titles but not clearly evidenced as a formal tech-lead role
No experience leading organizational change and limited recent mobile-ecosystem depth

key_factors.factor: No formal technical-leadership or org-change evidence
